MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. JEFFREY A. CLAUSE, Esq. and SARA M. PETERS, Esq. of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger (Tel: 415-981-7210) for plaintiffs;
Atty. ROBERT S. WILLOUGHBY, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP (Tel: 415-288-9800) for defendant the Regents of the University of California.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Pscyhiatric/Neurologic Examination Fo Plaintiff Jasleen Kukreja And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant Regents does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Matter discussed.

Matter is continued to March 30, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Pro tem judge to prepare a report and recommendation.
